chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Criminal Misc. Application No.981 of 2024 (Anjum (Khawajasara) vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge 18.12.2024. M/s. Qadir Hussain Khan and Shehla Anjum, advocate for applicant Mr. Shoaib Safdar, APG O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant has been granted bail in Crime No.67/2020, u/s 365-B, 302, 201, 202, 34 PPC at Police Station Pakistan Bazar, Karachi vide impugned order 06.07.2022 by learned X-Additional Sessions Judge, West, Karachi in the sum of Rs.200,000/-. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that applicant is a poor person and he cannot afford to furnish surety of Rs.200,000/- and that the same may be reduced to Rs.100,000/-. 3. Learned APG has opposed. However, keeping in view poor condition of the applicant, this application is allowed and the surety amount is reduced from Rs.200,000/- to Rs.100,000/-. The surety of which shall be furnished by the applicant to the satisfaction of the trial Court. This criminal miscellaneous application stands disposed of along with applications in above terms. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
